mapper.select: SELECT id FROM heritage WHERE ccba_kdcd = #{kdcd} AND ccba_asno = #{asno} AND ccba_ctcd = #{ctcd}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO heritage_media (heritage_id, url, caption, source) VALUES (#{heritageId}, #{url}, #{caption}, #{source})
INSERT INTO heritage_descriptions (heritage_id, content, depth_level, topic, parent_id, source) VALUES (#{heritageId}, #{content}, #{depthLevel}, #{topic}, #{parentId}, #{source})
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, name_hanja, category, period, ST_Latitude(location) AS lat, ST_Longitude(location) AS lng, thumbnail_url FROM heritage WHERE ST_Distance_Sphere( location, ST_GeomFromText(CONCAT('POINT(', #{lat}, ' ', #{lng}, ')'), 4326) ) <= 500 ORDER BY ST_Distance_Sphere( location, ST_GeomFromText(CONCAT('POINT(', #{lat}, ' ', #{lng}, ')'), 4326) ) LIMIT 5
